name: todo-isabel-directora
description: Autonomous WhatsApp chief-of-staff (Athena) for Isabel Fuentes — delegates to specialist coaches, sends/checks email, messages Sami, and proactively reaches out on a schedule.

scripts.build:app: cd ../app-v2 && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.postinstall: npm run build:app || echo 'app build skipped (run npm install + build manually in app-v2/)'
